description: Summary visualization: AlphaFold pLDDT at catalytic residues, phosphatase motif conservation, GO hierarchy, and verdict
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 2, figsize=(14, 10))
fig.suptitle('aceK (Q88EA1) GO:0004721 Validation — Summary of Evidence', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')

# Panel A: pLDDT at catalytic residues
ax1 = axes[0, 0]
residues = ['D374\n(active\nsite)', 'D380\n(Mg\nbind)', 'L406\n(Mg\nbind)', 'E442\n(APE\nmotif)', 'D480\n(phos.\ncat.)']
plddts = [91.6, 87.6, 96.1, 95.7, 89.1]
conserved = [True, False, False, True, True]
colors = ['#2196F3' if c else '#FF9800' for c in conserved]
bars = ax1.bar(residues, plddts, color=colors, edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
ax1.axhline(y=90, color='gray', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5, label='Very high threshold (90)')
ax1.axhline(y=70, color='gray', linestyle=':', alpha=0.5, label='Confident threshold (70)')
ax1.set_ylabel('AlphaFold pLDDT')
ax1.set_ylim(60, 100)
ax1.set_title('A. AlphaFold Confidence at Key Residues')
ax1.legend(fontsize=8)
conserved_patch = mpatches.Patch(color='#2196F3', label='Conserved w/ E. coli')
changed_patch = mpatches.Patch(color='#FF9800', label='Changed (non-essential)')
ax1.legend(handles=[conserved_patch, changed_patch], fontsize=8, loc='lower right')

# Panel B: DXDX(T/V) motif conservation
ax2 = axes[0, 1]
motif_positions = ['F473/476', 'Y474/477', 'D475/478', 'Y476/479', 'D477/480', 'E478/481', 'I479/482']
motif_ec = list('FYDYDEI')
motif_pp = list('FYDYDEI')
motif_match = [ec == pp for ec, pp in zip(motif_ec, motif_pp)]
motif_plddts = [96.3, 93.9, 91.9, 92.2, 89.1, 90.5, 93.2]

bars2 = ax2.bar(range(len(motif_positions)), motif_plddts, color=['#4CAF50' if m else '#f44336' for m in motif_match],
               edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
ax2.set_xticks(range(len(motif_positions)))
ax2.set_xticklabels([f'{ec}\n{pp}\n{"=" if m else "≠"}' for ec, pp, m in zip(motif_ec, motif_pp, motif_match)], fontsize=9)
ax2.axhline(y=90, color='gray', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5)
ax2.set_ylabel('AlphaFold pLDDT')
ax2.set_ylim(80, 100)
ax2.set_title('B. DXDX(T/V) Phosphatase Motif (7/7 conserved)')
ax2.set_xlabel('E. coli / P. putida residue')

# Panel C: GO term hierarchy
ax3 = axes[1, 0]
ax3.axis('off')
# Draw a simple tree
text_props = dict(fontsize=9, ha='center', va='center', 
                  bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='white', edgecolor='black'))

# Root
ax3.text(0.5, 0.92, 'GO:0004721\nphosphoprotein\nphosphatase activity', 
         fontsize=10, ha='center', va='center',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.4', facecolor='#FFEB3B', edgecolor='black', linewidth=2))
ax3.annotate('', xy=(0.5, 0.92), xytext=(0.5, 0.95))

# Children
ax3.text(0.25, 0.55, 'GO:0004722\nprotein Ser/Thr\nphosphatase activity', 
         fontsize=9, ha='center', va='center',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='#C8E6C9', edgecolor='black'))

ax3.text(0.75, 0.55, 'GO:0101014\n[IDH (NADP+)]\nphosphatase activity', 
         fontsize=9, ha='center', va='center',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='#C8E6C9', edgecolor='#4CAF50', linewidth=2))

# Arrows
ax3.annotate('', xy=(0.25, 0.67), xytext=(0.45, 0.83),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='black'))
ax3.annotate('', xy=(0.75, 0.67), xytext=(0.55, 0.83),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='black'))

# Labels
ax3.text(0.33, 0.78, 'is_a', fontsize=8, ha='center', style='italic', color='gray')
ax3.text(0.67, 0.78, 'is_a', fontsize=8, ha='center', style='italic', color='gray')

# Evidence
ax3.text(0.25, 0.35, 'E. coli: IDA (PMID:8702587)\nP. putida: not annotated', 
         fontsize=8, ha='center', va='center', color='#666')
ax3.text(0.75, 0.35, '0 annotations globally\n(recommended for curation)', 
         fontsize=8, ha='center', va='center', color='#4CAF50', fontweight='bold')

# Kinase counterpart
ax3.text(0.5, 0.12, 'cf. GO:0008772 ([IDH] kinase activity)\n2,635 annotations — already assigned to Q88EA1', 
         fontsize=9, ha='center', va='center',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='#E3F2FD', edgecolor='#2196F3'))

ax3.set_title('C. GO Term Hierarchy — Seed Term vs. More Specific Children')

# Panel D: Summary verdict
ax4 = axes[1, 1]
ax4.axis('off')

verdict_text = """VERDICT: Supported (with granularity note)

Failure Mode Tests:
✓ Pseudo-enzyme: EXCLUDED
  All catalytic residues conserved
  D477→D480 phosphatase catalytic: intact
  DXDX(T/V) motif: 7/7 conserved

✓ Mis-placement: EXCLUDED  
  PANTHER: PTHR39559:SF1 ✓
  Pfam: PF06315 + PF20423 ✓
  HAMAP: MF_00747 ✓

⚠ Granularity: MILD ISSUE
  GO:0004721 correct but too general
  → Recommend GO:0101014

Nearest characterized homolog:
  E. coli AceK (P11071)
  45.5% identity, IDA for GO:0004722"""

ax4.text(0.05, 0.95, verdict_text, fontsize=9, va='top', ha='left',
         family='monospace',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.5', facecolor='#F5F5F5', edgecolor='#333'))
ax4.set_title('D. Verdict Summary')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('aceK_validation_summary.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Figure saved as aceK_validation_summary.png")
